name: Genya Ravan
abstract: Genya Ravan (born Genyusha Zelkowitz; April 19, 1940), also known as Goldie, is an American rock singer and music producer. She was lead singer of the Escorts, Goldie and the Gingerbreads, and Ten Wheel Drive.

works.t: Little Big Horn, A Rock Oratorio

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: This is what’s so notable – most notable about Ten Wheel Drive in my life is, you’re on salary... Genya Ravan, the singer, she was a Janis Joplin knockoff, but she was great.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
